person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Origin«/b»
Joan was the daughter of Sir John Dynham of of Hartland, Devon, England.

Birth date 1370 is a guess, based on the birth of her husband, 1358, death of her mother by 1369, and the birth of her son, 1401.

«b»Family«/b»
Joan married before May 1400 to Sir Maurice Berkeley, son of Thomas Berkeley and Catherine Botetourt. Maurice died on 2 October 1400. At that point, they had no children, but Maurice was born some months later.

«b»Child of Joan and Maurice:«/b»
1.) Maurice born 9 Feb 1400/01 (after his father's death)

«b»Death and Legacy«/b»
Joan died 22 August 1412, probably at Uley, Gloucestershire, England.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Dinham於大約1368年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈特藍德時，她的父親Sir John de Dinham ,Knight52歲，母親Muriel de Courtenay31歲。她於大約1400年與Maurice Berkeley在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1412年8月22日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾其皮三享年45歲。

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Dinham was born about 1368, in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Dinham ,Knight, was 52 and her mother, Muriel de Courtenay, was 31. She married Maurice Berkeley about 1400, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 22 August 1412, in Chipping, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Dinham est née environ 1368, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Dinham ,Knight, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Courtenay, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice Berkeley environ 1400, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1412, à Chipping, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

Sie hat um 1400 in England Maurice Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 22. August 1412 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Chipping, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Dinhamが約1368年にイギリスイギリスデボンハートランドで生まれた時，父Sir John de Dinham ,Knightは52歳，母Muriel de Courtenayは31歳であった。約1400年にイギリスでMaurice Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1412年8月22日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアチップイングで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Dinham(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Dinham ,Knight(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel de Courtenay(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국에서 Maurice Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 치핀그에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Maurice Berkeley aproximadamente 1400, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Dinham родилась около 1368 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Dinham ,Knight было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Courtenay, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice Berkeley около 1400 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 22 августа 1412 г. в местности чиппинг, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
